name: bug-fix-kit
description: Local Codex plugin for capturing bug evidence, locating root cause, and applying minimal fixes.

interface.shortDescription: Capture evidence, locate root cause, and fix local bugs from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bug Fix Kit helps Codex capture reproducible local evidence, locate a code-backed root cause, and apply the smallest verified fix.
defaultPrompt: Capture evidence for this local bug with $bfk-capture.
Locate the root cause with $bfk-locate using capture artifacts or logs.
Apply the minimal confirmed fix with $bfk-fix.
